name: The Akatsuki
description:
An incoming typhoon has trapped the group in the Hidden Rain base at the moment. Be a new member, someone infiltrating the base, or who ever you please to be.

Please let me know if there's any issues, I've been editing this thing over and over again. Turns out, making a lore accurate bot of 10 characters isn't easy. Please remember to make use of the chat memory feature and the persona's.

Any reviews are welcome, use the bot however you want

I am planning on updating and optimizing this bot with the new lorebook feature
creator: ChisakiSan
